description: Critical configurations that MUST NOT drift. Auto-heal check #12 validates each one nightly. Drift = needs-Ken US filed immediately. Update this baseline ONLY through explicit Ken-approved decision logged in decisions.md.
lastApprovalContext: TKT-0014: 3-tier strategy. Haiku 4.5 = Tier 2. Baseline check added.

checks.name: Agent main model is Sonnet (per US11 model strategy)
checks.rationale: US11 model strategy: Sonnet is default for all standard tasks. Opus is reserved for high-stakes/2x-failed/Legal Agent only. Drift to Opus = ~3x cost burn. Detected 2026-04-27 07:32 AEST after silent drift caused Day 3 to run on Opus.

checks.name: Default primary model is Sonnet
checks.rationale: US11 model strategy default. Used when no agent-specific override exists.

checks.name: Fallback chain includes Opus then Gemma4 in correct order
checks.rationale: Emergency fallback chain. 26b stays as last-resort offline model — most capable local option for outage scenarios. Delegation tasks use e2b separately. These are distinct use cases.

checks.name: Ollama apiKey resolved (not placeholder)
checks.rationale: Hardened on 2026-04-27 (CHG-0003) after night-2 outage. Placeholder string OLLAMA_API_KEY caused fallback failure when Anthropic billing failed.

checks.name: Ollama auth-profiles entry present
checks.rationale: Belt-and-braces with config-004. Both auth layers must declare ollama-local for fallback chain to survive.
checks.fix_command: edit ~/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json: add profiles.ollama:default with provider=ollama and key=ollama-local

checks.name: Anthropic auth-profiles entry present
checks.rationale: Without this, primary + Opus fallback both fail. Whole platform stops.

checks.name: Workspace path consistent
checks.rationale: Drift here breaks all relative-path scripts and memory recall.

checks.name: Aria (business agent) model is Sonnet
checks.rationale: Option C decision 2026-04-27 21:18 AEST: Gemma4 cold-load (26B params) caused 30-60s freezes on every Aria Telegram response. Sonnet is always-on cloud — no cold-load, no RAM spike. Gemma4 remains available for background crons only.

checks.name: Aria fallback chain = Haiku then gemma4:e2b (no Opus)
checks.rationale: Aria must never escalate to Opus. Explicit fallback set to Haiku then gemma4:e2b. Activated 2026-04-28, TKT-0015.

checks.name: Shield (security agent) model is Sonnet
checks.rationale: Governance agents run Sonnet. No Opus (cost), no Gemma4 (quality risk). TKT-0013.

checks.name: Lex (legal agent) model is Sonnet
checks.rationale: Ken confirmed Sonnet sufficient 2026-04-28. Opus exception removed.

checks.name: Warden (governance agent) model is Sonnet
checks.rationale: Warden is a lightweight monitor. Sonnet only. TKT-0013.

checks.name: Haiku 4.5 registered in openclaw.json models (Tier 2)
checks.rationale: Haiku 4.5 is Tier 2 model (3x cheaper than Sonnet). Must be registered for cron routing. TKT-0014.
